sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String, result Decimal(9, 3)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_decimal (value, result) VALUES ('123.456', toDecimal32OrDefault('123.456', 3));
UPDATE test_decimal SET result = toDecimal32OrDefault('999.999999', 4) WHERE value = '123.456';
SELECT value, result, toDecimal32OrDefault('NaN', 0, CAST('0', 'Decimal32(0)')) AS safe_value FROM test_decimal;
SELECT toDecimal32OrDefault('1.999', 2) AS rounded_value, toDecimal32OrDefault('2.0001', 2, CAST('-1', 'Decimal32(2)')) AS default_value;
